Microsite

Remote I/O campaign microsite

A focused campaign page that keeps product visuals real, uses Moxa header/footer structure, and demonstrates export, forms, taxonomy, apps, and lead flow.

Start Lead FormView Builder

Campaign builder

Create, localize, export, and embed campaign pages.

The microsite covers six Excel items: content creation, delivery/syndication, forms, apps, taxonomy, and asset management.

10-minute campaign assembly

  • 1Select product campaign template and Moxa navigation.
  • 2Pull banner, product image, CTA, and proof cards from DAM.
  • 3Export HTML package or embed into a campaign route.
